title: SubscriptionInventory
description: The detected inventory of a profile's recurring charges (RecurringSeries), grouped from the spine's TransactionStream and categorized essential/negotiable/nice-to-have with monthly + annualized CAD budget impact (FR-BILL-001). Provided by Module 4 to Cash Safety, Pay, Tasks, Shopping, and Inbox. Money is integer minor units (cents); no binary float. Suspected-duplicate and pending transactions are excluded upstream so a series is never double-counted. Each series carries a FreshnessStamp; stale TransactionStream flags the impact figures (Constitution VIII).

data_completeness.description: partial when computed on a partial account picture (mirrors BudgetState.data_completeness); consumers MUST mark dependent views as Incomplete-data (Partial state).

series_id.description: Stable Bills-owned id for the recurring-charge group.

display_name_en.description: Localized series label; a series surfaced to users in only one language is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).

budget_category.description: Canonical BudgetState category key this series ties to (FR-BILL-001).

cadence.description: Inferred billing cadence. irregular/unknown ⇒ next_charge_on is an estimate and amount may be a range.

recurring_amount.description: Inferred per-occurrence recurring amount in integer CAD cents (already FX-converted upstream via TransactionStream.cad_amount for foreign subscriptions).

amount_is_estimated.description: true for variable-amount bills (e.g. utilities); recurring_amount is a last-known/trend estimate, never presented as exact.

amount_range_low_cents.description: Optional low bound for variable-amount bills (integer cents).

amount_range_high_cents.description: Optional high bound for variable-amount bills (integer cents).

necessity.description: Necessity classification (FR-BILL-001). Default nice_to_have unless a curated category mapping applies (spec C-3).

classification_source.description: user_override always wins over the inferred default (FR-BILL-001; Explainable & Auditable).

detection_state.description: dismissed series are excluded from the inventory and money math; user confirm/dismiss is an override over the heuristic.

monthly_impact_cents.description: Monthly budget impact in integer CAD cents (normalized from cadence). Negative for outflow when consumers treat it as a budget delta; magnitude here is non-negative.

annualized_impact_cents.description: Annualized budget impact = monthly_impact_cents x 12 (exact integer; no rounding). Integer CAD cents.

next_charge_on.description: Next predicted charge date; null/estimated when cadence is irregular/unknown.

freshness.description: Freshness of the underlying TransactionStream this inventory was derived from. Stale ⇒ consumers flag the impact figures.
